name: sendgrid
description: Send transactional email and manage marketing contacts with Twilio SendGrid

tools.name: Send Email
tools.description: Send an email via the SendGrid v3 Mail Send API

personalizations.description: Array of personalization objects, each with a 'to' array of {email, name} recipients, e.g. [{"to":[{"email":"a@b.com"}]}]

tools.name: List Contacts
tools.description: List marketing contacts in the account

historicalSummary.omitted: address, custom fields, and list membership details

tools.name: Search Contacts
tools.description: Search marketing contacts with an SGQL query (read-only search via POST)

tools.name: Upsert Contacts
tools.description: Add or update marketing contacts (asynchronous; returns a job_id)

list_ids.description: Optional list IDs to add the contacts to

generations.description: Template generations to include: legacy, dynamic, or legacy,dynamic

page_token.description: Pagination token from a previous response

tools.name: Get Email Stats
tools.description: Get global email statistics (delivered, opens, clicks, bounces) for a date range

aggregated_by.description: Aggregation period: day, week, or month

prompts.title: Send an email
prompts.prompt: Send an email via SendGrid with a subject, recipient, and HTML body.

prompts.title: Email performance
prompts.prompt: Show my SendGrid email stats for the last 30 days and summarize delivery, open, and bounce rates.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: SendGrid API Setup

steps.title: Sign in to SendGrid
steps.description: Go to https://app.sendgrid.com and sign in. A free tier account is sufficient for testing.

steps.title: Verify a sender
steps.description: Under Settings → Sender Authentication, verify a single sender address or authenticate your domain. Mail Send rejects unverified 'from' addresses.

steps.title: Create an API key
steps.description: Open Settings → API Keys (https://app.sendgrid.com/settings/api_keys) and create a key with Full Access, or Restricted Access including Mail Send, Marketing, Template Engine, and Stats.

steps.title: Set the environment variable
steps.description: Add the key to your .env as SENDGRID_API_KEY=SG....

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run List Templates to confirm the key works, then send a test email to yourself.

notes: Mail Send returns HTTP 202 with an empty body on success
Upsert Contacts is asynchronous — changes can take a few minutes to appear in List Contacts
